description_long: This storage box is a rectangular, robust container constructed primarily from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern. The box features a simple, blocky design with thick walls and a recessed front panel divided by a central vertical strip. The front and side panels appear to be made from a slightly different, possibly unfinished or raw wood, giving a subtle two-tone effect. There are no visible handles, locks, or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian and minimalist aesthetic. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for stacking or placing other objects. Its solid build suggests it is designed for durability and practical storage in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden storage box with a minimalist, two-tone design and a flat top surface. The box is utilitarian, with thick walls and no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed panel divided by a central vertical strip, highlighting the two-tone wood finish.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the same recessed panel and central divider visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again showing the recessed panel and central vertical strip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, matching the other side with the same panel and divider design.
